location: Lies on the ground inside a demi-human camp in a triangular ravine behind a stranded coffin boat, northeast of the Cerulean Coast West Site of Grace — no boss fight, just navigate past the demi-humans guarding it.
tactics: From the Cerulean Coast West grace, head northeast to find the entrance of a triangular ravine near a stranded coffin boat.
The sword sits in the ravine's lower-right corner, watched over by a demi-human camp including a demi-human swordsman — pick them off from range or dash in and grab the item.
No boss fight needed, just navigation through the ravine and past the demi-human pack.
Don't confuse it with the similarly named Spirit Glaive, a different weapon type found elsewhere in the DLC.
lore: A blade bent into a strange, twisted shape from long years of use around the gravesite, said to serve as a conduit for communing with wandering spirits.

builds.name: Intelligence/Dexterity hybrid
builds.why: D scaling in both Dexterity and Intelligence plus innate magic attack (59) lets it deal solid melee damage on an Intelligence-focused build without needing a separate buff, since it can't be enchanted anyway.
